description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a simple, robust design, featuring a flat plank-style tabletop and four straight legs at each corner. The wood grain is clearly visible, with natural variations and knots adding to its rustic appearance. The tabletop consists of several wide planks joined together, giving it a handcrafted look. The legs are sturdy and square, providing stable support for the table. There are no visible drawers, handles, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing a minimalist and functional style. The finish is matte, with a slightly rough texture typical of untreated or lightly finished wood.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden table with a plank-style top and four square legs, featuring a rustic, natural wood grain finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plank-style tabletop and two front legs, with visible wood grain and a slightly uneven surface.
description_view_1: Opposite side view highlighting the same plank arrangement, but with more pronounced wood grain lines and knots.
description_view_2: Side view with the tabletop planks running horizontally, showing the thickness of the tabletop and the leg structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with similar features to view 1, emphasizing the rustic wood grain and sturdy leg construction.
